message:
feat(pijs): improve runtime shims for extension conformance (bd-2ej3)

Add missing APIs and fix conformance issues:
- node:fs/promises: lstat, copyFile, rename, chmod, chown, utimes, appendFile, open, truncate
- @mariozechner/pi-ai: loginOpenAICodex, refreshOpenAICodexToken stubs
- @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent: SessionManager, getSelectListTheme, highlightCode,
  getLanguageFromPath, isBashToolResult, loadSkills stubs
- @sinclair/typebox: Type.Integer, Type.Tuple, Type.Record, Type.Ref, Type.Intersect
- ExtensionToolDef.label: String → Option<String> (fixes null label conformance diff)
- Tool label: only accept string labels (skip function labels like TS oracle does)
- Clippy: remove unnecessary raw string hashes on bunfig module

Results: Official 60/60, Community 53/53 testable, npm 47/63 (74.6%), third-party 18/23 (78.3%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
